feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business Technology Platform
feed.subtitle: SAP Business Technology Platform Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: MyInbox in the SAP Build Work Zone lists tasks, but does not display them.
entry.content:
I have subscribet to SAP Build Process Automation and SAP Build Workzone in the same Subaccount. 

On my Work Zone Site i added the Process Trigger and MyInbox component. The Process Trigger works fine but MyInbox isn't working correctly. It lists the assigend Task of an User on the left menue but nothing happens when i click on them to work on the forms.

I created an Destination on the subaccount für SAP Build Process Automation in preparation for MyInbox on Work Zone.

 

SAP Build Process Automation SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition SAP Build Work Zone, advanced edition

entry.title: Workzone BPA task error "Failed to resolve dependencies of 'CrossApplicationNavigation.js'"
entry.content:
Dear Community,
since Monday I can’t see custom tasks in Workzone in some clients' sub-accounts.

The error I see in the browser console is:
Failed to resolve dependencies of 'sap/ushell/appRuntime/ui5/services/CrossApplicationNavigation.js'

Tasks are correctly viewable on use MyInbox of BPA.

Does anyone else have this error?

@Archana Could it be due to some update over the weekend?

Best Regards

entry.title: Unable to load tutorial https://developers.sap.com/mission.btp-application-cap-e2e.html
entry.content:
Hello,

I am trying to access below tutorial:

https://developers.sap.com/mission.btp-application-cap-e2e.html

On click of the tutorial to expand it, Its not loading at all.

I could see few errors in the browser console:


I tried using different browsers, signed in, and signed out, but it's not helping.

Can someone suggest how to access this tutorial?

Thanks
Vivek Rawat

entry.title: SAP Business Application Studio
entry.content:
When I open a BAS session, I can't see the Cloud Foundry icons in the left column.

I'm using a trial version.

Anything am I missing?

Thanks!

entry.title: Subscription failed for Build Process Automation for Singapore AWS region
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am not able to subscribe for SAP Build Process Automation Service in BTP Trial account for Singapore region. Can someone please help?

entry.title: Cant access transaction in WEBGui for HTML via SAP Build Workzone
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

 

i am trying to set up SAP build work zone to access SAP Gui transactions but i get this message when I try to open the App i created for my Website.

This is the app im trying to open:

 

Destination im using for the System in BTP

Cloud Connector connection config Cloud to on Prem:

 

Regards

Rouven

entry.title: How to transport custom role collections between BTP subaccounts through Cloud Transport Management
entry.content:
We have a requirement to transport the custom build role collections from  Dev BTP subaccount to Quality Sub account through Cloud Transport Management.

How can we achieve this?

Thanks & Regards.

entry.title: Platform user for Destination WM_CF_SPACE_PROVIDER in Build Process Automation
entry.content:
I configured the destination WM_CF_SPACE_PROVIDER according to the documentation https://help.sap.com/docs/build-process-automation/sap-build-process-automation/configure-destination-for-live-process-projects 

When I entered my Universal ID mail address and password, it was working. The Check Connection shows: Connection to "WM_CF_SPACE_PROVIDER" established. Response returned: "404: Not Found", so no 401 anymore.

The documentation says, I should use a platform user from the default identity provider and that I should not use a SAP Universal ID user. However the only way I got this destination working was to enter my Universal ID information.

As this destination is shared in the whole subaccount I would like to create a different user and add this to this destination (That's also what the BTP cockpit advices me to do).

Where should I create such a user? The only way I can think of is creating it as a Universal ID user, however  the documentation tells me I should not use a Universal ID user. Also, this requires me to create another mail address to keep the user separate from my Universal ID which is not nice.

entry.title: X12 License for Trial Account
entry.content:
I am using trial account for BTP Cockpit and Integration Suite, for learning purpose.

Type System “ASC X12” is showing “Unlicensed”.

Any idea, how I can obtain license for my trial account.

Thanks, Fahar

entry.title: Need User Activity Logs from SAP BTP Platform
entry.content:
Hi SAP

Can we get User Activity Logs from SAP BTP Platform for last 1 year?

 

 

 

Thanks

 

Rajdeep


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: User Management change history /audit log
entry.content:
Hello, Our audit team is requesting the user management audit log, but I do not see the tab or link that can show it. Please can you let us know if that change log even exists in the BTP.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: MTBF & MTBR & MTTF
entry.content:
Hi Guys,

Could someone please guide me on how to generate a report in SAP PM that includes the KPIs: MTBF, MTTF, MTTR, and MTBR? When using transactions MCI7, MCJB, or MCJC, I can only find MTTR and MTBR.

I'm working with SAP S/4HANA and would appreciate any help on how to extract the missing KPIs (MTBF and MTTF).

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: updating the xsuaa has no effect and no error
entry.content:
Hi all,

We have a curious problem. In the dev and test environment the update of the xsuaa works without problems. In production it does not make any changes. For example, the update date does not change. Is there a possibility to display logs?

Deployed with the CTMS. Manual with cf update-service and via the BTP Cockpit. No errors with all variants

entry.title: How to save Data from Cloud Services on File System
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

 

i was wondering if there is a way to save data on filesystem from cloud services like SAC, Datasphere etc..

Is it possible to connect these via Cloud Connector and save data on prem in filesystem? Can you use integration suite for this scenario?

 

Greetings

entry.title: Oracle DataWarehouse between S/4HANA and SAC Planning
entry.content:
Dear community,

I am reaching out to you concerning the following. My client embarked the SAP roadmap by buying S/4HANA FIN core, Ariba, & Fieldglass and SAC (planning) without the Datawarehouse functionality within de SAP-Stack and would like to stick to there Oracle DWH. 

I have no experience with this scenario and I am concerned concerning the following.

S/4HANA > Oracle DWH: Are we still able to use the standard business content extractors with the same functionality as if we are using DWH on HANA technologie.

Oracle DWH > SAC planning: Writeback functionality is it possible and if yes what is exactly required and  are we loosing any functionality

Oracle DWH > SAC: Hiërarchie functionality is there a delta between live & extract and is there a delta between HANA & Oracle

Oracle DWH > SAC: date notation same question as above

Oracle DWH > SAC: Attribuut time dependent, navigational same question as above

Let me know you thoughts or guide me to the right resources. Any light on this issue is welcome.

Your prompt reply is valued & much appreciated.

Regards,

nalmai

entry.title: SAP Cloud ALM - Automated test case could not be created. Destination: 'XXX' 404 Not found
entry.content:
When trying to create a new automation test case received an error message. 

"Automated test case could not be created.

Destination: '<Automation Provider>' 404 Not found.

HTTP Status 404 - Not found."

#SAPCloudALM #API #TestAutomation #Tricentis

entry.title: Popup: Couldn't subscribe to SAP BTP. Try again. If the problem persists, please post a question.
entry.content: There is a popup generated when I try to subscribe SAP BTP. Popup: Couldn't subscribe to SAP BTP. Try again. If the problem persists, please post a question.

entry.title: How to access HTML5 Application in SAP BTP Cloud Foundry from mobile device
entry.content:
I create app in BAS and deploy to SAP BTP Cloud Foundry.

I would like to access this app from mobile device.

Is it possible to access like via app url or something?

Best Regards,

Khaing Zin

entry.title: Updating the schema of CAPM without losing the data.
entry.content: I want to add one more column 'status' to the Books table. I'm doing this by changing the code  like, adding status below the attachments and using the command 'cds deploy' this to the sqlite db. It is working fine but the issue is that the entire data in the db is wiped. I want to keep the data in the db only but need to update the schema of the Books table. How to do that?

entry.title: How to map Groups from Okta to NEO Subaccount's Roles?
entry.content:
Hi,

We are using a corporate IDP on IAS.

We want the groups to flow from OKTA to the Neo SUbaccounts however there is no section to maintain the mapping against the Role collections.

Need help to understand how this can be achieved


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.
